software.name: AMD Chipset Drivers
software.description: Official AMD chipset driver package for B450 motherboards. Required for PCIe, USB, SMBus, and Ryzen power management.

software.name: ASUS ROG STRIX B450-F GAMING II Drivers
software.description: Motherboard-specific drivers including LAN, audio (Realtek), utilities, and firmware tools.

software.name: Realtek Audio Driver (ROG B450-F II)
software.description: Realtek ALC S1220A audio driver for your ASUS ROG B450-F Gaming II motherboard.

software.name: Intel I211-AT LAN Driver
software.description: Official LAN driver for the Intel I211-AT Ethernet controller used on your ASUS B450-F II.

software.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070 Driver
software.description: Latest Game Ready Driver for your MSI RTX 3070 Gaming Z Trio LHR.

software.name: MSI Dragon Center (Optional)
software.description: RGB, fan control, and monitoring for MSI GPUs. Optional but useful for your Gaming Z Trio.

software.name: Samsung Magician
software.description: SSD health, firmware updates, and performance optimization for your Samsung 980 NVMe.

software.name: Kingston SSD Manager
software.description: Health monitoring and firmware updates for your Kingston SA400 SATA SSD.

software.name: AMD Ryzen Master
software.description: Monitoring, tuning, and temperature control for your AMD Ryzen 5 3600.

software.name: HWiNFO64
software.description: Deep hardware monitoring for CPU, GPU, motherboard sensors, NVMe, RAM, and more.

software.name: MSI Afterburner
software.description: Fan curves, GPU monitoring, and overclocking for your RTX 3070.

software.name: OpenRGB
software.description: Universal RGB control for motherboard, RAM, GPU, and peripherals.

software.name: MemTest64
software.description: RAM stability testing for your 32GB DDR4 Corsair kit.

software.name: CrystalDiskInfo
software.description: SMART monitoring for both your Kingston SATA SSD and Samsung NVMe.

software.name: Windows 11 Debloater (Chris Titus Tech)
software.description: Safe, modular debloating and optimization for Windows 11.
